# Summary

<!-- What this PR delivers, one paragraph. -->

## Traceability

- Backlog item: `.apptlas/backlog/…`
- Implements: <spec §N / ADR NNNN / plan task>

## Definition of Done

<!-- Full policy: .apptlas/policies/definition-of-done.md -->

- [ ] All AC verified by their declared method; evidence in the item file
- [ ] Deliverable exercised end-to-end as a product
- [ ] TDD followed (tests first, seen failing, then green)
- [ ] `docs/architecture/` pages for touched modules updated in this PR
- [ ] Spec-fidelity statement recorded (faithful, or divergences with disposition)
- [ ] rustdoc current; ADR added/superseded if a boundary or guarantee changed
- [ ] `make ci` green locally; no fake completeness
- [ ] Non-implementer review: spec compliance ✅ + quality approved
